summary: Completed testing of P0 Bug Fix (Support queries from Student Funnel appearing in admin Support Center) and P1 Features (Assign Lead functionality in Student/School/Growth Partners CRM, Comment/Note functionality in School CRM). All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check API returns healthy status
Backend: POST /api/support/query - Creates support query from SupportFlow
Backend: GET /api/support/queries - Returns support queries (P0 bug fix verified)
Backend: Support query appears in admin panel after creation
Backend: GET /api/inquiry/queries - Team Inquiries endpoint works
Backend: GET /api/support/tickets - Legacy Tickets endpoint works
Backend: PATCH /api/support/queries/{id} - Update support query status
Backend: GET /api/team-users - Returns team users for assignment
Backend: POST /api/students/inquiry - Create student inquiry
Backend: PATCH /api/students/inquiry/{id} - Assign student lead
Backend: PATCH /api/students/inquiry/{id} - Unassign student lead
Backend: POST /api/schools/inquiry - Create school inquiry
Backend: PATCH /api/schools/inquiry/{id} - Assign school lead
Backend: POST /api/schools/comment/{id} - Add comment to school inquiry
Backend: GET /api/schools/comments/{id} - Get comments from school inquiry
Backend: POST /api/growth-partners - Create growth partner
Backend: PATCH /api/growth-partners/{id} - Assign growth partner lead
Backend: POST /api/growth_partners/comment/{id} - Add comment to growth partner
Backend: POST /api/students/comment/{id} - Add comment to student inquiry
Frontend: Admin login works correctly
Frontend: Support Center loads with 3 tabs (New Queries, Overdue, Closed)
Frontend: Support Center shows 'User Support' source filter option (P0 bug fix)
Frontend: Support Center displays queries from SupportFlow with 'User Support' badge
Frontend: Student CRM loads with Assign and Add Note buttons on lead cards
Frontend: Student CRM Assign Lead modal opens with team member selection
Frontend: Student CRM shows 'Assigned to: Team Member' on assigned leads
Frontend: School CRM loads with Assign and Note buttons on lead cards
Frontend: School CRM Assign Lead modal opens with team member selection
Frontend: School CRM Comment modal opens with previous comments and input field
Frontend: School CRM shows 'Assigned: Team Member' on assigned leads
Frontend: Growth Partners CRM loads with Assign and Add Note buttons
Frontend: Growth Partners Assign Partner modal opens with team member selection
Frontend: Growth Partners shows 'Assigned: Team Member' on assigned partners
Frontend: Student Funnel shows 'I have a query / need support' option
Frontend: SupportFlow shows 4 categories (Demo Related, Ongoing Classes, Ongoing Course in School, Other Query)
Frontend: SupportFlow form displays with Contact Name, Phone, Email, Question fields
seed_data_creation: Created test data via API tests (prefixed with TEST_) for students, schools, growth partners, and support queries
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Bug Fix verified: Support queries from SupportFlow.jsx (POST /api/support/query) now appear in admin Support Center via GET /api/support/queries endpoint. AdminSupportUnified.jsx fetches from 3 sources: Team Inquiries (/api/inquiry/queries), User Support (/api/support/queries), and Legacy Tickets (/api/support/tickets). P1 Features verified: Assign Lead functionality works in Student CRM, School CRM, and Growth Partners CRM - modal opens with team member selection, assignment persists and displays on lead cards. Comment/Note functionality works in School CRM (newly added) and was already working in Student and Growth Partners CRM.

mocked_apis_list: OTP verification - uses 1111 as test OTP (not real SMS/WhatsApp)
